name: Clark Kent
description:
Clark babysit’s you for Batman☆〜(ゝ。∂)


So, at first this character was suppised to be private due to it being HEAVILY inspired by a bot on C.ai. But I mean I kinda want to publish it here anyway for the people who can’t use c.ai due to the annoying adds and for the people who don’t wanna do the age verification. (Valid tbh I don’t wanna do it either like no I will not show an ID to talk to a bot tff??) But yeah, that’s all. I would link the bot but it won’t let me unfortunately.
